name: Creole Fish Soup
recipeIngredient: None specified (1 lb Red snapper, boned/shredded)
None specified (1 lb Shelled shrimp, diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lemon juice in a large saucepan.
2. Simmer for 40 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
3. Add lemon juice; stir and serve.
